desc: Dismisses all Revit warnings matching a specified failure definition type.
summary: Dismisses all Revit warnings matching a specified failure definition type. Use MCP.GetRevitWarningsByFailureType to identify the type first. Requires user confirmation — never auto-execute without explicit approval.
precondition: Active document must have warnings of the specified type.
postcondition: All warnings of the specified type are dismissed.

config_inputs.name: FailureDefinitionId
config_inputs.description: GUID of the failure definition type to dismiss

preprompts: Dismissing all warnings of this type...
thinkingsteps: Finding all warnings matching the failure type...
successprompts: Dismissed {count} warnings of type "{type}". {remaining} warnings remain.
